summary: Iteration 3 — Frontend-only testing of PackageDetail redesign (Hadiyya-style) and new PackagePrint route. All 60 UI assertions passed on the public preview URL. Hero, quick-info bar, description, bonuses, pembimbing, includes/excludes, terms, itinerary day cards, hotels (with rating + check-in/out), flights (airport codes + times), transport, sticky CTA card (Daftar + WhatsApp), and Print buttons all render correctly for umrah-vip. window.print() is correctly invoked by print-action-btn. Print page renders all three pages (cover, itinerary, terms) with summary table, flight table, hotel table, includes/excludes, day-by-day table, terms, and contact. All 4 package IDs (umrah-economy, umrah-vip, umrah-plus, haji-khusus) work on both /packages/:id and /print/packages/:id. Unknown id redirects to /.
action_items: (Optional) Print page toolbar back button overlaps the first print-page slightly because of negative top margin; visually it's fine in screenshot but consider adjusting if it ever blocks content on smaller viewports.
(Optional) /packages/:id back link uses to='/#packages' — react-router v6 doesn't auto-scroll to fragment. Carryover nit from iteration 2.
critical_code_review_comments: PackageDetail.jsx (~470 lines) and PackagePrint.jsx (~360 lines) are within healthy size limits.
PackagePrint embeds a large inline <style> block — fine for a print-only route but consider moving to a CSS module if it ever needs reuse.
Print page uses window.print() — relies on browser dialog to save as PDF. No server-side PDF generation. This is fine per spec but means quality depends on user's browser/print settings.
All interactive/key elements have data-testid attributes — testing UX excellent.
Itinerary day cards correctly use data-testid='itinerary-day-{d.day}' enabling deterministic testing.
BRAND data used in print page (phone, email, address, social) — no hardcoded values.
No console errors observed during navigation across all 4 packages and both routes.
test_credentials: Not required — print and detail routes are public.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL is https://umrah-landing.preview.emergentagent.com (NOT the one in the review_request which was stale). PackageDetail and PackagePrint pages tested with full data-testid coverage. All 4 packages (umrah-economy/umrah-vip/umrah-plus/haji-khusus) render correctly on /packages/:id and /print/packages/:id. window.print() is invoked from print-action-btn. No backend changes in this iteration — backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_admin_blog.py still valid.
